{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":523278,"duration_api_ms":432204,"num_turns":60,"result":"Phase 2 완료. 커밋 `d35da910`.

**변경 요약**
- `webhard-api/src/folders/_lib/resolve-company-root.util.spec.ts` 신규 — Company 등록/fallback 2단계(name)/fallback 3단계(정규화)/전부 실패의 4 케이스로 3단계 탐색 순서·호출 횟수 검증.
- `webhard-api/src/folders/folders.service.spec.ts` `relocateContactFiles` describe 에 케이스 #5~#7 추가 — Company 미등록 가상업체 + webhardFileIds 이동(핵심 regression), 정상 Company 합집합 이동, 빈 orClauses 엣지.
- `webhard-api/src/contacts/contacts.service.spec.ts` `findOne` describe 신규 — 케이스 #8~#10 으로 `webhard_file_id` 필드 검증. 공용 `PrismaMock` 에 `drawingRevision.findFirst`, buildService 의 drawingRevision 모의에 `getLatestForCurrentStage` 추가.

**AC 검증** — `webhard-api && pnpm test` 36 suites / 590 tests 통과 (Phase 1 baseline +1 suite, +10 tests). 기존 task 18·19·20·21 테스트 영향 없음. 기존 silent bail-out 에 의존한 테스트는 없어서 기대값 수정 불필요. `index.json` phase 2 status `completed`.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"060797bc-1485-49a8-bf5c-d5b27b0318c1","total_cost_usd":5.245477999999999,"usage":{"input_tokens":69,"cache_creation_input_tokens":200428,"cache_read_input_tokens":6409016,"output_tokens":31518,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":200428,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":517,"cache_read_input_tokens":171306,"cache_creation_input_tokens":565,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":565},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-7[1m]":{"inputTokens":69,"outputTokens":31518,"cacheReadInputTokens":6409016,"cacheCreationInputTokens":200428,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":5.245477999999999,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"c9ce43d1-f254-4f80-911e-7d84f211b30a"}
